name: Tuna Danish
recipeIngredient: 2 cans 7 oz tuna, packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and flake it lightly.
2. Combine the tuna, cabbage, and carrot; set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together low-fat yogurt, catsup, vinegar, salt, pepper, and paprika until well combined.
4. Add the tuna mixture to the sauce mixture and blend well.
5. Place one slice of toast on each plate.
6. Add several lettuce leaves to each plate.
7. Arrange 2/3 cup of tuna mixture over the lettuce.
8. Top with cucumber slices.
9. Sprinkle lightly with paprika.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 1/2 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Starch Exchange + 1 Vegetable Exchange; CHO: 19g; PRO: 23g; FAT: 7g; SOD: 630; CHO: 44mg. For low-sodium diets, omit salt and use unsalted canned tuna and catsup.
